query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: Two women pose playfully against a plain white wall. The woman on the left wears a yellow blazer over a dark blue top, a magenta miniskirt, black leggings, and black high-heeled shoes with ankle straps, and has a red accessory in her hair. The woman on the right wears a lime green top under a black vest, an orange miniskirt, fishnet stockings, and gold patterned high heels, accessorized with a wide black and yellow belt, layered necklaces, a green hair accessory, and a fishnet glove on her raised right arm. Both women stand with one arm raised above their heads.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Two women pose playfully against a plain white wall in retro-styled outfits featuring aggressively clashing bright colors and visible film grain. The woman on the left wears a yellow blazer over a dark blue top, a magenta miniskirt, black leggings, and black high-heeled shoes with ankle straps, and has a red accessory in her hair. The woman on the right wears a lime green top under a black vest, an orange miniskirt, fishnet stockings, and gold patterned high heels, accessorized with a wide black and yellow belt, layered necklaces, a green hair accessory, and a fishnet glove on her raised right arm. Their clothing combines unbalanced neon hues including yellow, magenta, lime green, and orange that create visual tension, while the analog film texture adds organic imperfection across the frame.
